◎简　　介  

　　Making his way to Honolulu, David Banner seeks out the help of Dr. Carolyn Fields, a noted psychiatrist and hypnotherapist whom he hopes could help him with his bizarre problem. However, she initially refuses, citing severe concerns of her own.
